name: Wasteland Uplink (Amber)

dark.customCSS: body { font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace !important; text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 176, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 0.5px; } /* Scanline Overlay */ body::after { content: ''; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 4px, 6px 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 99999; } /* Flatten UI */ * { border-radius: 2px !important; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ffb000 !important; } ::selection { background: #ffb000; color: #000000; }

light.customCSS: body { font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace !important; text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 176, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 0.5px; } /* Scanline Overlay */ body::after { content: ''; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 4px, 6px 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 99999; } /* Flatten UI */ * { border-radius: 2px !important; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ffb000 !important; } ::selection { background: #ffb000; color: #000000; }

her.customCSS: body { font-family: 'VT323', 'Courier New', monospace !important; text-shadow: 0 0 4px rgba(255, 176, 0, 0.6); letter-spacing: 0.5px; } /* Scanline Overlay */ body::after { content: ''; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 4px, 6px 100%; pointer-events: none; z-index: 99999; } /* Flatten UI */ * { border-radius: 2px !important; } ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: #ffb000 !important; } ::selection { background: #ffb000; color: #000000; }

author: silentoplayz (G30)
description: Post-apocalyptic terminal with Radiation Dust Canvas FX, VT323 monospace font, amber phosphor glow, and weathered UI elements.
